name: Witchcrafter Return
desc:
Until the end of your next turn, your "Witchcrafter" cards are unaffected by your opponent's card effects.
During the End Phase, if this card is in your GY, you can choose 1 of these effects:
(1) Banish this card; Special Summon 1 "Witchcrafter" monster from your Deck.
(2) Add this card to your hand.
You can only use 1 "Witchcrafter Return" effect per turn, and only once that turn.
strings: Add this card to your hand
